items.name: safe-lcp-prediction-framework
items.description: Leakage-aware machine learning framework for Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) prediction, classification, and optimization using Lighthouse performance metrics with SAFE protocol and SHAP explainability.

items.name: PhosFate
items.description: PhosBind is a machine learning framework that leverages ESM2 protein embeddings to predict and classify anion-binding sites, with a focus on phosphate recognition. It enables data-driven insights into protein–anion interactions for applications in biomolecular design and nutrient recovery.

items.name: MLFromCore
items.description: A growing machine learning framework built entirely from scratch in pure Python — no external libraries such as NumPy or scikit-learn.  The goal is to deeply understand how machine learning algorithms work internally by implementing them from first principles.

items.name: An-Integrated-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Behavioral-Discount-Modeling-and-Campaign-Forecasting-i
items.description: A machine learning framework that personalizes discount strategies at the user-product level and forecasts campaign outcomes such as GMV, CVR, and Margin.

items.name: prediccion-rendimiento-cafe-CLR-GRASP-GBHS
items.description: Framework experimental para regresión basado en Clusterwise Linear Regression (CLR) y metaheurísticas GBHS/GRASP. Integra K-Means, ElasticNet y árboles de decisión para optimizar hiperparámetros y evaluar múltiples modelos de Machine Learning usando métricas R², MAE y RMSE sobre distintos datasets.

items.name: awesome-agentic-machine-learning

items.description: Deep learning framework for day-old chick gender classification using YOLO and machine learning.

items.description: An open-source Python framework for hybrid quantum-classical machine learning.

items.description: A Python framework for GPU-accelerated simulation, robotics, and machine learning.

items.name: caretSDM
items.description: caretSDM applies a geoprocessing framework to the caret machine learning package, facilitating the access of Species Distribution Modeling community to state-of-the-art methods.

items.name: Hypertension_Biomarkers
items.description: This project develops a bias-aware machine learning framework for hypertension biomarker discovery in underrepresented populations. Using six integrated RNA-seq datasets, the study applies ancestry stratification, batch-effect correction, and explainable AI (XAI) to identify and validate ancestry-specific biomarkers.

items.description: A professional-grade framework for 2026, enabling verifiable off-chain AI inference through Zero-Knowledge Machine Learning (ZK-ML). Nodes provide model outputs accompanied by cryptographic proofs of correct execution to smart contracts.

items.name: End-to-End-Supply-Chain-Performance-Delay-Root-Cause-Analysis

Strategies the benchmarked against real 2025 races for comparison.
